figure.title: Error Detected at Accelerator UPLI Completer
figure.purpose: Shows the system state when an error is detected at the UPLI Completer of an Accelerator.

technical_summary: An error is detected within the UPLI Completer of ACC A.
The entire UPLI Originator and UPLI Completer block in ACC A is highlighted with a dashed box.
A loopback symbol (purple arrow) is shown between the Originator and Completer, indicating that the node is isolating itself from the network.

components.name: UPLI Completer (ACC A)
components.description: The component where the error is detected.

critical_facts: An error at the UPLI Completer level causes the entire UPLI interface of that accelerator to enter an isolated state.
